blocks.content: Shirone emerged from the intestines into a secluded alley in Laviette city.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh, this feels really weird.
Smoke was rising from various parts of the city visible through the alley.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What's going on?
A group of demons came running from the back of the alley.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: The intruder isn't alone! Find and slaughter them all! Show them the power of the Stealth Squad!
Demons with animal-like features quickly passed by Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hey! You!
A demon with a lion's face jumped down from a building and landed in front of Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Lion-faced demon
blocks.content: Who are you? You look like a demon, but don't you know what's happening in the city?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uh, well…
The lion-faced demon's expression turned fierce.

blocks.speaker: Lion-faced demon
blocks.content: Don't tell me you're running away?
Since Croseide, one of the Seven Generals, was a demon, it was naturally shocking.

blocks.speaker: Lion-faced demon
blocks.content: You pathetic coward! How can a demon run away from the battlefield!
The demon extended his sharp claws, ready to slash Shirone's throat mercilessly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What's the commotion?
A woman with a cat's face approached, her fur standing on end.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Ah, Captain!
It was Oris, the Stealth Captain of the Seven Generals of Laviette.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: The city is in chaos, and instead of working together, you're fighting among yourselves? What a disgrace!

blocks.speaker: Lion-faced demon
blocks.content: No, Captain. This guy is a deserter. He ran away in fear.
Oris examined Shirone and had the same thought as her subordinate.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: A demon. And an intelligent one.
He didn't look like a combatant, and judging by his appearance, he seemed quite young.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: The death of a captain is sad. But it's not like Buddha has come, so why should demons be terrified?

blocks.speaker: Lion-faced demon
blocks.content: I-I'm sorry.
Oris patted Shirone's head.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Don't worry. Even if Croseide was the strongest in terms of power, war isn't won by strength alone. Your intelligence will surely be helpful. Come, I'll take you back to the unit.
As soon as she finished speaking, Oris grabbed Shirone and shot forward like an arrow.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wow.
Shirone could match the speed, but what surprised him was the incredible sense of balance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Definitely different from humans.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Hehe, don't be so surprised. If you train hard, you can run as fast as me someday. Though demons rarely put in the effort.
Wanting to leave Shirone with an honorable memory, Oris continued.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: You're an intelligent type. Running away from instinct means you're quite smart. But demons shouldn't run from enemies.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. I won't run away anymore.
If running away made him more noticeable, it was better to fight.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Haha! But don't worry too much. I'll take care of all the intruders.
Arriving in the city center where the combined forces of the Seven Generals were, Shirone joined the Special Task Force.

blocks.speaker: 7th Squad Leader
blocks.content: ...Deserted?
After hearing the explanation from the Stealth Squad member, the 7th Squad Leader, Ishak, looked at Shirone with contempt.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Tch, a weak intelligent type.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Though you deserve to be killed immediately, I'll let it slide this time for Captain Oris's sake. Get in!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Y-Yes.
As Shirone joined the demons of the 7th Squad, it was like seeing a giant and a dwarf.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Who's this kid? Can you even fight with that body? No matter how strong demons are…

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Leave him. His mind is already rotten. Growing up won't change anything.
Ishak shouted.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Quiet! There's a report of an enemy 200 meters west. Are you all ready?

blocks.speaker: Demons
blocks.content: Yes!
The demons' responses were loud, and Shirone's voice added to the sound waves.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's finish them off!
With the 7th Squad's battle cry, 200 demons charged at incredible speed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who is this intruder causing such chaos?
Even while matching their speed, Shirone couldn't shake his curiosity.
At first, he heard it was a low-level demon.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There!
Amidst the barricades set up by Kimara's subordinates, a woman was rampaging.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Screech! Screech!
Shirone's expression turned incredulous.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Son Yu-jung?
The intruder in Laviette wasn't a low-level demon but an actual monkey.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Screech! Too weak!
Every swing of her two clubs shattered the armor of the security forces.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Attack! Take her down before she escapes the encirclement!
Following Ishak, 200 Special Task Force members charged at her simultaneously.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This isn"t right.
Even as he was swept along by the army, Shirone sensed the futility of the battle.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The great-granddaughter of the Monkey King.
According to Omega, Sun Wukong was a martial god who had the longest record of fierce battles against Ymir.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But why is she in hell?
More importantly, she wasn't real.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A clone. So the real body is elsewhere…
Through Ultima, he sensed that she was just a special signal, not yet defined as a living being.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Her string ability was similar to Hexa"s but differed in that it couldn"t exist in reality.
In the end, it was half-baked power.
Yet Son Yu-jung's prowess overwhelmed the entire Special Task Force and security forces.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Haha! Over here! Over here!
As she roamed the city, Son Yu-jung changed direction and approached Ishak.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Ugh!
Ishak also generated electricity from his horns and threw a punch, but his arm was severed instead.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: That bastard…!
Enraged by the monkey's antics, Ishak turned his head but was soon dismayed.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: What the hell is that?
As his subordinates fell one by one, Shirone's figure stood out.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: You idiot! Fight!
From his belligerent perspective, Shirone seemed more hateful than the intruder.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: You brainless fool! I should kill you myself…!
As if to echo his sentiments, Son Yu-jung swung her club at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It"s over.
It really seemed that way.
But as the illusion cleared, an unbelievable situation registered in his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: W-What?
Shirone had dodged the blow with just a twist of his waist, something even Ishak hadn't seen.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Quantum movement.
For the first time, Son Yu-jung's clone, finding nothing to hit, looked intrigued.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Ook?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If I get more than 93% close to Yahweh, the hidden code will be released. I need to stay in the city until Lethe leaves.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Screech!
No matter how many attacks she launched, she couldn't even graze Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As expected, clones have significantly lower intelligence. They just mechanically repeat a few phrases.
Without the Nimbus Cloud, a clone was less than half a being.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What"s the attribute of demons again?
Fire and electricity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then I…
As Shirone moved with quantum precision, Son Yu-jung's clone made a startled face.
Probably an animal instinct.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Experiencing a probability that couldn"t exist in nature, she became wary.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Screeeech!
Then, using all her strength, she twisted her body and swung her club.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The red afterimage passed harmlessly over Shirone's bowed head…
…Electric Photon Cannon.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A blue electric sphere crackled menacingly in Shirone's hand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Take this.
As he slammed it into her abdomen, Son Yu-jung's hair stood on end.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh, this is tricky.
To find out how she got here, he needed to meet the real body, but that would bring another set of problems.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You, you…
Meanwhile, Ishak stared at Shirone with a dazed expression.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Controlling fire and electricity is a demon trait. But that movement…
It wasn't an ability allowed to an ordinary demon.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Name, no.
Holding his severed shoulder, Ishak knelt before Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: May I ask your name, my lord?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What?
Ishak looked up again.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: I apologize for not realizing sooner. You possess a different kind of magic than us demons. I was rude to someone who inherits not Satan's flesh or blood, but his spirit.
If it wasn't a hidden code inherited by a few bloodlines, it couldn't be explained.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Please, may I have the honor of knowing your name?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yupi.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Oh, how splendid. A name that fits your intelligent and royal appearance perfectly.
In hell, there are over 4,000 words for lies, and Yupi's nuance was 'a small lie.' When someone asks how you're doing in passing, and you just say you're fine, that's Yupi.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Lord Yupi, please become the captain of the Special Task Force. I will serve you with all my heart.
He didn't want to stand out, but he realized that demons' nature was the opposite of reality.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Refusing here would be even stranger.
It was like an employee shouting they wanted to work more even after the boss told them to go home.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The strong must rule.
It was the iron rule of hell.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fine. If there's no one stronger than me in the Special Task Force, I'll lead you.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: I can assure you. Though I'm not weak in the unit, I can't compare to you, Lord Yupi.
Ishak discarded his severed arm without hesitation and led Shirone back to the city center.
Where Son Yu-jung's clone had rampaged, demon corpses were scattered everywhere.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What a mess. At this rate, Laviette will be destroyed in a few days.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Wait here.
Ishak said, lifting the tent flap of the temporary command post and entering.

blocks.speaker: Execution Commander Itaka
blocks.content: Ah, I have urgent news, so I came despite the rudeness. I apologize.
A large demon with skin like burns blocked Ishak.

blocks.speaker: Defense Commander Moonom
blocks.content: If you know it's rude, don't do it. What's the matter? And what happened to your arm? Were you attacked?
His face had melted, leaving him with one eye, and his lips were burnt, exposing all his teeth.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Yes. But I took one down.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: So, to report a few things…

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Took one down? Did you really?
If the reports were accurate, they were the only unit to subdue an intruder by force.

blocks.speaker: Kimara
blocks.content: Where is he now?

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Waiting outside the tent…
Before he finished speaking, Itaka ordered.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Bring him in.
Moments later, Ishak entered with a demon child, and silence fell over the tent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Small? Demons are known for their physical strength. How did he take down an intruder?

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Oh? You?
As everyone turned to her, Shirone awkwardly smiled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ha ha, hello?
